reason: Merging unique, verified/qualified content from post 47377 (a confirmed near-duplicate, word-for-word identical to 1620 on its Documentation and Priya case-study sections) BEFORE 47377 is redirected to this canonical article. Only the genuinely unique 'Cost Considerations' table is merged, rewritten with every unverifiable commercial figure qualified ('varies by provider -- confirm directly') per the user's explicit no-unverified-figures rule. The 'Our Top Pick: Tangerine' recommendation from 47377 is deliberately NOT merged -- 1620 already has its own 'RBC = Best overall' recommendation in its existing At-a-Glance box, and including Tangerine as a competing 'Top Pick' would create a direct internal contradiction. User validated this exact text before writing.
